  1. org.springframework.data.mongodb
  2. MongoTransactionOptionsResolver

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.mongodb.MongoTransactionOptionsResolver

Packages that use MongoTransactionOptionsResolver
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.mongodb
Spring Data's MongoDB abstraction.

  • Uses of MongoTransactionOptionsResolver in org.springframework.data.mongodb

    Methods in org.springframework.data.mongodb that return MongoTransactionOptionsResolver
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static MongoTransactionOptionsResolver
    MongoTransactionOptionsResolver.defaultResolver()
    Obtain the default MongoTransactionOptionsResolver implementation using a mongo: prefix.
    Constructors in org.springframework.data.mongodb with parameters of type MongoTransactionOptionsResolver
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    MongoTransactionManager(MongoDatabaseFactory databaseFactory, MongoTransactionOptionsResolver transactionOptionsResolver, MongoTransactionOptions defaultTransactionOptions)
    Create a new MongoTransactionManager obtaining sessions from the given MongoDatabaseFactory applying the given options, if present, when starting a new transaction.
     
    ReactiveMongoTransactionManager(ReactiveMongoDatabaseFactory databaseFactory, MongoTransactionOptionsResolver transactionOptionsResolver, @Nullable MongoTransactionOptions defaultTransactionOptions)
    Create a new ReactiveMongoTransactionManager obtaining sessions from the given ReactiveMongoDatabaseFactory applying the given options, if present, when starting a new transaction.
